creator: peter@bsdenergy.net
text:
When entering the loader prompt and executing 'lsmod' and having a list longer than one screen one cannot quit the pager with <q> as diplayed in the last line. Instead <q> has the same effect than <enter> (line down).

The same effect is seen when calling '?' from the prompt.

In my understanding <q> should quit the pager at the current position and not scroll down to the end/next page.

How-To-Repeat: Interrupt boot and enter loader promt.
Enter '?' and try to exit '<q>' the pager.
